name: Herbed Shrimp & Feta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8x12-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
3. In a separate bowl, mix eggs, evaporated milk, plain yogurt, feta cheese, Swiss cheese, chopped parsley, dried basil, dried oregano, and minced garlic.
4. Spread half the cooked pasta over the bottom of the baking dish.
5. Cover with salsa.
6. Add half the shrimp on top.
7. Spread remaining pasta over the shrimp.
8. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the pasta.
9. Add the remaining shrimp and sprinkle mozzarella cheese on top.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Remove from oven and let stand 20 minutes before serving.
